scenes.text: Long ago, in the heart of East Java, there stood a kingdom called Daha — prosperous, peaceful, and loved by its people.
King Kertamarta ruled with wisdom. Under his reign, the rivers ran clear and the harvests never failed.
He had two daughters. Candra Kirana, the younger — gentle, kind, adored by everyone. And Galuh Ajeng, the elder — beautiful, but with a heart that always wanted more.
For now, the kingdom was at peace. But beneath the surface, something was about to change.
